alphabet = "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz{}"

function decrypt(text, key):

    result = ""

    for i from 0 to len(text) - 1:

        c = index_of(text[i], alphabet)

        a = integer(key[i mod len(key)])
        b = integer(key[(i + 1) mod len(key)])

        shift =
            (a * b + a + b)
            mod 54

        p =
            (c - shift + len(alphabet))
            mod len(alphabet)

        result += alphabet[p]

    return result
